headline: KKR, Macquarie in Italy-backed talks over telecoms network commercial deal, sources say
summary: The owners of Italiantelecommunications companies FiberCop and Open Fiber arediscussing the terms of a possible commercial deal to completethe country's high-speed broadband rollout, three sources...

headline: Vinson & Elkins Expands Corporate Practice With 4 New Partners in Denver & D.C.
summary: Keith Trammell, Chalyse Robinson, David Strong, and Alex Bahn By Karen Roman Vinson & Elkins said Keith Trammell, Chalyse Robinson and David Strong joined the firm in Denver and Alex Bahn entered its office in Washington, D.C. Trammell, Robinson, and Strong will also work in the firm’s New York practice. The new partners previously served at WilmerHale and have […] The post Vinson & Elkins Expands Corporate Practice With 4 New Partners in Denver & D.C. appeared first on CorpGov.

headline: Thrive Capital Takes On Pro Sports With A Stake In The San Francisco Giants
summary: Thrive Capital has bought a small stake in the San Francisco Giants through a new holding company called Thrive Eternal.

headline: KKR, Capital Group Launch Asia Hybrid Credit Fund During Private Credit Turbulence
summary: KKR & Co. and Capital Group are working on the launch of an Asia public-private credit fund, which will launch this year.

raw.headline: KKR, Capital Group Launch Asia Hybrid Credit Fund During Private Credit Turbulence

headline: Your Credit Score Is Setting Your Car Insurance Rate — Lawmakers Want to Stop That
summary: States push to ban credit-based insurance pricing, raising debate over fairness, premiums and consumer impact across U.S.
